definitions.text: ta opp, lage (en film eller lignende)
definitions.translation: to record, make (a film or similar)

definitions.text: gi inntekt ved framvisning (av film, teaterstykke eller lignende)
definitions.translation: to yield income through exhibition (of a film, play, or similar)

examples.en: the film has brought in large sums
